title: Cowpoopmod
description: This mod makes cow poop, adds pizza and doner kebab, armor, tools, and ores
body:
Overview:
The Cow Poop Mod brings a fun and quirky twist to Minecraft by introducing new items, blocks, and features based on the humorous concept of "cow poop." Whether you’re crafting unique tools, building with unconventional materials, or simply adding a touch of humor to your world, this mod is sure to bring a smile to your face. With custom items like the powerful Poop Wand and blocks like the squishy Cow Poop Block, you’ll discover new and creative ways to interact with Minecraft's environment. The Ores that have been added will not generate yet.

Features:
Many Cow Poop based Blocks.
Cow Poop Wand to "poopify" your world
Overpowered Foods:
-Pizza
-Doener Kebab
-Cow Poop Sandwich
Overpowered Tools and Armor:
-Cow Poop Material 
-Reinforced Cow Poop Material(very OP)
AND Dirtstairs/-buttons/-walls/-slabs. :D
Some advanced Blocks are still in Work

Gameplay:
Crafting: Discover unique recipes to create these new items and blocks. The Poop Wand can be crafted and used for various magical tasks or just for fun.
Building: Use the Cow Poop Block and Cow Poop Stairs to create unique structures. These blocks come with their own sound effects and properties, giving your builds a distinctive touch.
Exploration: Find new ways to use these items in your survival or creative world, or just enjoy the light-hearted nature of the mod as you explore its features.

Compatibility:
The mod is fully compatible with Minecraft version 1.21+ and works alongside other mods without issues. It’s a lightweight, fun addition for players who want to add a bit of humor to their Minecraft experience.

Server Compatability is unknown.

(THIS MOD IS STILL IN WORK!!!!!)
